listings.title: CA / Tax Consultant Available
listings.description: Chartered Accountant with 12 years experience. Specialises in GST filing, income tax returns, and business audits. Home visits available.

listings.title: Advocate — Civil & Family Law
listings.description: Practising advocate at Karnataka High Court. Expert in property disputes, family matters, and documentation. Community members get priority.

listings.title: Doctor — General Physician
listings.description: MBBS, MD. General consultations, preventive health check-ups. Available weekdays 9am–7pm. Home visits on request for senior community members.

listings.title: Groom Wanted — Software Engineer, 27
listings.description: Fair, 5'4", B.Tech graduate, employed in MNC. From Davangere, family settled in Bengaluru. Seeks well-educated, professionally employed groom from our community.

listings.title: Bride Wanted — Doctor, 30
listings.description: MBBS, MD, 5'10", working in reputed hospital. Family originally from Chitradurga. Seeks educated, family-oriented bride. Caste no bar for deserving matches.

listings.title: Groom Wanted — Teacher, 26
listings.description: B.Ed graduate, teaching in government school. 5'3", homely nature. Family from Holalkere. Seeks stable, employed groom from Madhya Karnataka community.

listings.title: Accountant Required
listings.description: Retail firm in Rajajinagar seeks experienced accountant. Tally knowledge mandatory. 2+ years experience. Salary ₹18,000–₹25,000 p.m. Walk-in Mon–Sat.

listings.title: Office Assistant / Receptionist
listings.description: Clinic in Mahalakshmi Layout requires female receptionist. Computer knowledge required. Freshers welcome. Timing: 9am–5pm. Salary negotiable.

listings.title: Sales Executive — FMCG
listings.description: Growing FMCG company needs field sales executives. Two-wheeler mandatory. Attractive incentives + salary. Community preference. Immediate joining.

listings.title: Seeking Data Entry / Office Job
listings.description: Graduate, 24 years, good typing speed (50 WPM), MS Office proficient. Available immediately. Willing to work in any location within Bengaluru.

listings.title: Driver — LMV / HMV Licence
listings.description: Experienced driver, 10 years, holds both LMV and HMV licence. Familiar with all Bengaluru routes. Available for full-time or part-time assignments.

listings.title: 2 BHK Flat For Rent
listings.description: Well-maintained 2 BHK, 2nd floor, 1050 sq.ft. Semi-furnished. Close to metro. Suitable for families. Rent ₹16,000 p.m. + maintenance. Available June 1.

listings.title: 30×40 Site For Sale
listings.description: BDA approved 30×40 corner site. Clear title, east-facing. Residential zone. ₹85 lakhs negotiable. Genuine buyers only. No brokers please.

listings.title: PG Accommodation — Ladies
listings.description: Spacious PG for working women & students. 2–3 sharing rooms. Homely food available. 24hr security. Close to IT hub. ₹6,500–₹8,000 per month all inclusive.

listings.title: Maruti Swift — 2019 For Sale
listings.description: Single owner, 42,000 km driven. Petrol, manual, Vxi trim. All insurance and PUC valid. Excellent condition. ₹5.80 lakhs. Genuine buyers only.

listings.title: Honda Activa 6G — 2022
listings.description: Well-maintained scooter, 12,000 km, red colour. All documents clear. Genuine reason for selling. ₹68,000 negotiable.

listings.title: Grocery Store Partnership Sought
listings.description: Established 8-year-old grocery shop seeks silent investor partner. Good footfall, prime location. ROI 18–22% p.a. Investment ₹5–10 lakhs. Accounts available for inspection.

listings.title: Franchise Opportunity — Bakery Brand
listings.description: Well-known Bengaluru bakery brand offering franchises. Low investment, training provided, exclusive territory. Ideal for homemakers or retired persons.

listings.title: Home Tuition — Maths & Science
listings.description: Experienced tutor (M.Sc, B.Ed) offers home tuition for classes 8–10 and PU. CBSE, ICSE & State board. Kannada and English medium. Flexible timings.

listings.title: Spoken English & Personality Development
listings.description: Weekend batch starting June. 6-week course. Certificate provided. Batch size limited to 10 students. Fee: ₹2,000. All age groups welcome.

listings.title: Computer Basics & Tally Classes
listings.description: Basic computing, MS Office and Tally ERP 9 training. Day & evening batches. Suitable for job seekers and homemakers. Affordable fees. Placement assistance.

listings.title: Catering Services — All Events
listings.description: Traditional Madhya Karnataka cuisine catering for functions, marriages, naming ceremonies and corporate events. Min. 50 pax. Vegetarian & non-vegetarian menus.

listings.title: Plumbing & Electrical Repairs
listings.description: Licensed plumber and electrician. Quick response. All repairs, installations and maintenance work. Reasonable rates for community members. Available 7 days.

listings.title: Photography & Videography
listings.description: Professional photographer for weddings, events, portraits and product shoots. Drone coverage available. Album printing also done. Packages starting ₹8,000.

listings.title: Char Dham Yatra Package — June
listings.description: Special pilgrimage package: Badrinath, Kedarnath, Gangotri, Yamunotri. 14 nights / 15 days. Includes flight, hotel, meals & guide. Community group discount available.

listings.title: Goa Group Tour — August
listings.description: Fun-filled 5 nights / 6 days Goa package. AC coach from Bengaluru. Hotel, breakfast & dinner included. Price ₹9,500 per person. Families welcome. Limited seats.
